text: Lord, help me never boast in wrongdoing or place confidence in anything that opposes Your truth. Let my confidence be in Your goodness alone.
Father, guard my tongue and my words. Help me speak truthfully, kindly, and in ways that honor You.
Lord, help me love what is good and reject what is evil. Shape my heart to desire righteousness and truth.
Father, protect me from deception and from using words that harm others. Let my speech reflect Your love and wisdom.
Lord, remind me that only what is rooted in You will endure. Help me build my life upon Your truth.
Father, help me learn from Your wisdom and walk humbly before You with reverence and faith.
Lord, keep me from trusting in wealth, success, or worldly security. Teach me to rely completely upon You.
Father, thank You that I can flourish in Your presence like an olive tree. Help me remain rooted in Your unfailing love.
Lord, I will praise You for all You have done. Help me wait patiently upon You and trust in Your faithfulness.
